response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software engineering, leadership in open-source projects, and mentorship roles, but lacks direct experience with C++ (only mentions C in one role) and large-scale cloud infrastructure (despite distributed systems work). His background is strong in web and mobile technologies, which doesn’t align closely with the cloud compute platform focus. Leadership and mentorship are evident, but cloud-specific expertise is missing.
strengths: Extensive leadership and mentorship experience, including organizing workshops and teaching
Proven track record in open-source projects and community-driven development (e.g., GISCollective)
Strong software craftsmanship with practices like TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development
concerns: Lacks direct experience with C++ (only mentions C in one role, not meeting the 8-year C++ requirement)
Limited cloud compute platform experience; most roles focus on web/mobile technologies
No explicit experience with large-scale cloud architecture or DevOps engineering
